title: Software Update - DFU - Updating screen above 90%
scenario: Firmware update (DFU) shows "Verifying" message and "Almost there, don't leave yet" text from 90% to 99% progress
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Connect to a Poly Bluetooth audio device
Initiate a firmware update (DFU) for the connected device
Observe the progress bar during the update
expected: When the firmware update progress reaches 90%, the screen displays a "Verifying" message on the progress bar along with the text "Almost there, don't leave yet". This screen is shown from 90% to 99%.
